businesses.shortDescription: Mobility specialists in Cwmbran supplying, installing and servicing stairlifts, bathing aids, toileting aids and other mobility equipment.
businesses.name: aven Mobility

imageAlt.cardImage: Haven Mobility logo or business image.
imageAlt.heroImage: Haven Mobility showroom exterior in Cwmbran.

gallery.assets/images/businesses/haven-mobility/: Haven Mobility premises or featured business image.
Red rise and recline chair available from Haven Mobility.
Mobility scooter available from Haven Mobility.
Cream rise and recline chair available from Haven Mobility.

businesses.description:
Haven Mobility specialise in supplying, installing and servicing all types of disabled aids and mobility equipment, from stairlifts to bathing and toileting aids. Based in Cwmbran, our small, focused team has over 40 years experience in the industry and as an organisation we have excellent working relationships with all the leading manufacturers of mobility equipment in the UK.

Free, no obligation quotes for stairlift installations Mobility scooters and powered wheelchairs available on Motability Servicing and repairs of mobility equipment Showroom in Cwmbran with a wide range of demonstration products Member of the British Healthcare Trades Association (BHTA)

We are a stockist for the biggest manufacturers in the UK, including Days Healthcare, Homecraft Rolyan, Drive Medical, Roma Medical, Pride Mobility, Kymco, Z-Tec Mobility, Nottingham Rehab Supplies, Primacare, Cosyfeet and Brooks Stairlifts.

Haven Mobility have a fully-featured showroom in Cwmbran, housing a wide range of demonstration models of mobility aids. This includes a working demonstration stairlift and through-floor wheelchair access lift.

Haven Mobility also has a workshop facility with a team of highly experienced engineers, offering servicing and repairs of your mobility equipment for peace of mind.

Beijing House is a Chinese takeaway in New Inn, Pontypool, serving customers across Torfaen including Pontypool, New Inn and Cwmbran. The team prepares a wide choice of freshly cooked Chinese dishes, from fried rice and chow mein to spare ribs, spring rolls, chicken wings and sesame prawn toast.

Customers can order online through the official Beijing House website or call the takeaway directly for friendly local service. The menu is built around familiar favourites, fast preparation and satisfying takeaway food for evenings, weekends and family meals.

Based at 36 The Walk, Beijing House gives local customers a convenient Torfaen takeaway option for collection and delivery, with regular opening hours through the week and a straightforward online ordering experience.

businesses.description:
Jock The Lock offers professional, experienced locksmith services from a locally based team in Cwmbran. Their technicians use up-to-date car entry technology and are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for customers who need fast, reliable support.

The business has been providing locksmith services and repairs for many years, with a focus on high levels of customer service across Torfaen, Newport, Cardiff, the Valleys and surrounding areas. Jock The Lock is fully independent, meaning customers avoid national company prices while still receiving professional, well-equipped support.

With vans stocked with a full range of lock and car key equipment, the team aims to respond quickly and help customers safely get moving again. Emergency call-outs are handled with the aim of reaching customers within an hour where possible.

businesses.description:
MG Carpets & Rugs is a family-run flooring specialist serving customers from showrooms in Cwmbran and Newport. Established in 1994, the business supplies quality flooring to domestic and commercial customers at highly competitive prices.

The team stocks a comprehensive range of fitted carpets, rugs, runners, remnants, blinds, laminates, hard floors, Karndean and LVT. Customers can visit either showroom for practical advice, product choice and help selecting flooring that suits their home, budget and lifestyle.

MG Carpets & Rugs offers free estimates, free fitting included with the purchase of carpet underlay, and free local delivery. With decades of experience, the business focuses on reliable service, good value and helping local customers make confident flooring decisions.

businesses.shortDescription: Warm, story-led celebrant services by Katie Thomas for weddings, naming ceremonies, fond farewells and meaningful life moments.
businesses.name: Iris Blue Celebrancy

imageAlt.cardImage: Iris Blue Celebrancy logo.
imageAlt.heroImage: Katie Thomas conducting a wedding ceremony for Iris Blue Celebrancy.

gallery.assets/images/businesses/iris-blue-celeb: Katie Thomas conducting a wedding ceremony.
Wedding couple image representing Your Day ceremonies.
Hands holding baby feet representing naming ceremonies.
Candle and flowers representing fond farewells.
Katie Thomas from Iris Blue Celebrancy.

businesses.description:
Hi, I am Katie Thomas. Welcome to Iris Blue Celebrancy. Bringing joy, offering support, listening to stories and sharing in life's special moments are just some of the things I love most.

A celebrant-led wedding is all about you, your story, your style and your way. Unlike traditional ceremonies, the world is your oyster: you can choose a venue that speaks to your heart, from a windswept beach to a rustic barn, a woodland hideaway or your own backyard.

Naming ceremonies celebrate newness amongst family and friends, marking the beginning of a journey and recognising identity. These ceremonies offer loved ones a heartfelt space to express their hopes, dreams and visions for the future.

Fond farewells are created with care at difficult moments. Katie will listen to your memories, support you through your grief and help create a farewell ceremony that truly reflects the love and connection you shared.

Let's grab a cuppa and have a proper natter. I offer a complimentary, no-pressure introductory chat where we can swap stories and see if Iris Blue Celebrancy is the right fit for your day.

businesses.description:
Springvale MOT and Service Centre in Cwmbran provides a comprehensive range of garage and auto services for cars, vans and motorcycles. The team is committed to providing an honest, personal and friendly service, with much of their custom coming through local recommendation.

As an accredited VOSA Test Centre, road safety is a primary concern. Springvale provides MOTs, pre-MOT checks and general vehicle testing for all makes and models of cars and light commercials.

The garage also carries out vehicle repairs, motorcycle repairs, van repairs, brake, clutch and exhaust work, electrical fault finding, engine diagnostics, breakdown call-outs, scan and test services and vehicle servicing. Where possible, a vehicle collection service is also available.

Springvale uses up-to-date technology when carrying out diagnostics and aims to offer customers great value alongside friendly, professional service.

businesses.description:
Gazlocks provides trusted domestic and commercial locksmith services across Cwmbran and the wider South Wales area. The business operates 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, supporting customers who need fast help with lockouts, lock changes and lock repairs.

As an independent local locksmith, Gazlocks aims to gain entry using non-destructive methods wherever possible. Customers can expect a fast, professional service with fixed prices and no hidden fees.

Gazlocks works with both home and business customers across Cwmbran, Newport, Pontypool, Cardiff, Abergavenny and everywhere in between, providing reliable locksmith support when security, access and peace of mind matter most.

If you are looking for great savings on quality used cars in the South Wales area , then you have reached the right place.Philip Retter has over 28 years experience in running his used car dealership based in Risca.Proud to offer you a first class customer service and very competitive pricing, so please browse our stock list. If you are looking for a second hand car in Newport area , then don't delay, call us today to book a test drive. In order to offer cars to suit everyone we make sure that we update our stock list regularly. It is therefore always worth giving us a call, even if you don't see what you are looking for on our website.

We realise that buying a car can be a daunting experience, but don't worry, we are well established within the Risca area and come with a great reputation. Furthermore we offer excellent advice and experience on vehicles. Our friendly staff will go the extra mile to guarantee that you receive the advice you need. This is the reason why many of our customers keep coming back to us.

At Philip Retter Car Sales we don't just sell cars, we do everything possible to get you driving your perfect car. Why not come along to our dealership on Darran Road,Risca?

businesses.description:
Murray's Minibus Hire is based in New Inn, Pontypool and provides reliable minibus hire for customers across South East Wales and the UK. The business is known for safe, dependable transport and competitive prices.

The fleet includes minibuses from 8 seats through to larger 16, 33 and 44 seat vehicles, making Murray's suitable for smaller groups, larger parties, schools, contracts and private hire.

businesses.shortDescription: Independent Newport van specialist sourcing new and pre-registered light commercial vehicles from leading manufacturers.
businesses.name: Pure Vans Ltd

imageAlt.cardImage: Pure Vans Ltd logo or business image.
imageAlt.heroImage: Pure Vans showroom in Newport with light commercial vehicles outside.

gallery.assets/images/businesses/pure-vans-ltd/p: Pure Vans showroom with vans outside in Newport.
Aerial view of the Pure Vans showroom in Newport.

businesses.description:
Founded in 2009, Pure Vans Ltd has now been trading for over 15 years . Pure Vans is an independent company specialising in sourcing a variety of new and pre-registered light commercial vehicle from a range of manufacturers.

Having started out from humble beginnings, we now own and operate out of premises on the junction of George Street Bridge and Corporation Road in Newport.

Although most of our sales are completed over the phone, and online, we welcome visitors to our premises where they can discuss their needs and purchase in person.

Over the past decade we have worked hard to forge close relationships with commercial vehicle manufacturers and finance companies to ensure we can offer our customers considerable discounts and favorable finance terms. We currently sell in excess of 2500 vans per year, with an annual turnover in excess of ?35,000,000.

With over 160 years of collective experience in the motor trade and finance industry, our knowledgeable sales team can provide impartial advice on the best vehicle and package for you and your business.

We work with businesses, small and large, private individuals and sole traders and pride ourselves on our customer satisfaction. We are also Principal Partner to Newport County AFC , displaying our name on the home shirts, stand sponsors, and also suppliers of their kit van.

businesses.shortDescription: Pontypool guitar shop offering repairs, professional setups and handpicked sales with honest, careful service from owner Dave Holland.
businesses.name: Frets Guitars

imageAlt.cardImage: Frets Guitars logo or business image.
imageAlt.heroImage: Frets Guitars featured business image.

businesses.description:
​Frets is Pontypool's home for guitar repairs, professional setups and handpicked sales - run with craft and care by owner Dave Holland.​ ​ ​ ​

Dave Holland has spent years working on guitars of every shape, age and condition. From a worn acoustic in need of a new nut to an electric that's lost its intonation, Dave approaches every instrument with the same level of patience and attention to detail.

Based at Pontypool Market, Frets Guitars is a proper local guitar shop - the kind where you can bring in your battered old six-string, have a conversation about what it needs, and know it's in safe hands.

No upselling, no guesswork, just honest work done well.

Whether you're a beginner looking for your first electric, a gigging musician needing a fast turnaround repair, or a collector chasing something special - Dave's door is always open.

imageAlt.cardImage: B Active Sports Massage & Therapy logo.
imageAlt.heroImage: B Active Sports Massage and Therapy clinic frontage.

gallery.assets/images/businesses/b-active-sports: B Active Sports Massage and Therapy clinic frontage.

businesses.description:
B Active Sports Clinic, Cwmbran is run by Andrew Parker who's aim is to provide the highest standards of client care in a friendly and professional environment.

We take great care to establish each patient's individual needs are met in order to treat you accordingly and promote a fast recovery. In addition to Sports injuries we also offer the same high standard therapies and massage treatments to non sports clients. TREATMENTS Common Injuries that we treat include:

Bruising, swelling and redness are all signs of injuries. The area may also feel tender to touch. Injuries come in many forms but the two most common are sprains and strains. Treatment methods : Hands on therapy (massage mobilisation) Electrotherapy (ultrasound interferential) Exercise therapy (including personal home exercise) programmes relative to your activities. Rehabilitation/Gym Work Specific sports stretching.

Sports massage should be tailored to each individual's needs to positively enhance ones ability to perform. Sports massage is also recognized as being one of the most effective treatment for an injury. Benefits of sports massage There are numerous benefits attached to a Sports / Deep Tissue Massage: Improves lymph and blood circulation thereby improving bone nutrition and repairs. Aids joint mobility Helps posture Mechanically stretches muscles, tendons and ligaments which can not be achieved through active stretching alone Encourages better flexibility Discourages the formation of scar tissue Encourages relaxation allowing the body to function more efficiently Helps remove metabolic waste from the body Increases muscle tone

Regardless of whether you exercise or play sport to keep fit, or compete from club to international level, then sports massage may be of benefit to you. Opening Times The clinic is open at the following times. Monday 8:30 - 6:00 Tuesday 8:30 - 6:00 Wednesday 8:30 - 6:00 Thursday 8:30 - 6:00 Friday 8:30 - 6:00 Saturday Closed Sunday Closed

businesses.shortDescription: Griffithstown computer engineers offering fast, friendly and reliable repairs, support and service.
businesses.name: The Little Computer Shop

imageAlt.logo: The Little Computer Shop logo with phone number and email address.
imageAlt.cardImage: The Little Computer Shop logo.
imageAlt.heroImage: The Little Computer Shop exterior on Windsor Road in Griffithstown.

gallery.assets/images/businesses/the-little-comp: The Little Computer Shop exterior with computer repair signage.

businesses.description:
Computer repair "experts" crop-up on practically every street corner (often with no other contact details than a mobile phone number), there are computer doctors, wizards and gurus everywhere. At The Little Computer Shop, Griffithstown we strive to be different - we are simply Computer Engineers - we are experts at what we do and offer a fast, friendly, reliable and warranted service at market-leading prices from a long established business.

We are the premier providers of PC, Laptop & Broadband service and repairs for the South East Wales area.

Our goal is to provide you with the very best service at the most reasonable cost, without any jargon and at minimal inconvenience to yourself (we know and understand just how frustrating computer problems can be).

We aim to offer "fixed-price" repairs in all circumstances.

We offer an on-site service either at your home or business premise and also a free collect and return / reinstall service - both of these operate outside of normal office hours and can always be arranged at a time convenient to you.

Indeed ANY other issue - we can deal with it - without fuss or drama.

galleryCaptions.assets/images/businesses/the-little-comp: Computer repairs, sales and upgrades in Pontypool

businesses.description:
If you're looking for competitively priced foot care treatments with excellent after-care in Risca, you've come to the right place!

Whether you have a long-standing health problem that affects your feet, such as diabetes or arthritis, or you have been experiencing foot pain, don't delay.

If you have a busy schedule and would prefer an early or late appointment, we have clinic opening hours from 9am to 6pm, or we can arrange a home visit covering RISCA, CROSS KEYS and ROGERSTONE at a little extra cost - if you are unable to attend one of the clinics.

Nail Cutting Corns Verrucas Hard Skin Ingrowing Toenails Foot Pain Solutions Diabetic & Arthritic Foot Care Gait Assessment Sports Podiatry Injuries Nail Surgery Foot Massage Children's Feet

businesses.description:
At One2One Estate Agents, we're on a mission to deliver a seamless and transparent selling experience. Founded in 2019 by Mark and Niall, our agency emerged from high demand among our mortgage clients seeking guidance in selling their homes. Our core principle revolves around a fixed agent selling fee, ensuring fairness for all clients.

We offer a unique blend of online accessibility and the convenience of a local high street office in Pontnewydd. Our "No Sale, No Fee" policy eliminates financial risk. With a strong online presence and dynamic social media marketing, we ensure maximum exposure for your property.

You'll find professional materials and visuals readily available in our welcoming office environment. With dedicated, experienced staff guiding you every step of the way, your house becomes our top priority.

At One2One Estate Agents, we are here to answer your questions, provide guidance, and assist you with all your estate planning needs. Please feel free to contact us through the methods below, and our in-house professional will be happy to assist you.

businesses.shortDescription: Family-run door and flooring supplier offering internal doors, laminate, solid wood flooring and specialist fitting.
businesses.name: Cwmbran Door Centre

imageAlt.cardImage: Cwmbran Door Centre Ltd logo.
imageAlt.heroImage: Cwmbran Door Centre banner for quality doors and floors.

gallery.assets/images/businesses/cwmbran-door-ce: Cwmbran Door Centre quality doors and floors banner.

businesses.description:
At Cwmbran Door Centre we offer a huge selection of internal doors from the country's leading suppliers. We also supply a large selection of flooring both solid wood and laminate and we are able to provide specialist fitting too. Cwmbran Door Centre is a family run company based on Olbury Rd combining our traditional approach to service, meeting and exceeding the needs of our customers and by dealing directly with our suppliers and product manufacturers to achieve the most competitive prices, Cwmbran Door Centre for unbeatable quality at unbeatable prices - an irresistible combination, especially in the current economic climate. ​

Internal Doors We offer an extensive range of internal feature timber doors in oak, pine and hardwood. Our range includes glazed doors, fire doors, bifolding doors as well as pre-primed doors and prefinished doors offering a huge range of sizes and styles.

The flooring in your home needs to be strong enough to withstand daily wear and tear, and for this reason solid wood and laminate floors can be a wonderful investment and an excellent choice if you want long-lasting, rich floors with a touch of class. In addition to the benefit of being durable, wood flooring adds warmth and elegance to any room and are of tremendous benefit for family members with asthma or dust mite allergies.Not sure what you want or what is right for you?

Our fantastic team of staff are happy to share their expertise and will help you choose the most suitable doors or flooring and accessories. Feel free to give us a call for free advice, or drop in for a chat and a coffee any time.

You can find us incorporated with Cwmbran Timber and DIY based on Oldbury Road.

E.R Simms Garage Doors are registered Garador suppliers and installers,offering the highest level of quality and reliability on a complete range of Garage Doors along with operators and Garador spares.

Fully trained in the installation and maintenance of garage doors.

We supply a variety of materials, including steel, timber and GRP, with a complete range of standard and special sizes and colours.

Our roller garage doors are insulated roller garage doors. Its engineering excellence and quality craftsmanship let this door stand out from other products offered in today's marketplace.

businesses.description:
Located at Unit 21 in Pontypool Indoor Market, Man Cave & Boyzone is an independent retailer serving customers from Pontypool, Torfaen, Cwmbran, Newport and across South Wales.

The shop focuses on popular hobbies, interests and gift ideas, with stock covering fishing, football, gaming, gadgets, collectibles and practical everyday accessories. It is a place to browse for something different, whether you are shopping for yourself, looking for a present, or hunting for a useful item at a fair price.

The range includes fishing tackle and accessories, watches, family games, remote-control cars, gaming mouse mats, men's clothing, Pokemon cards, trading cards, hobby items and unique gift ideas. Stock is updated regularly, so there is always something new to discover.

Man Cave & Boyzone offers friendly local service, competitive prices and a genuine independent-market shopping experience. It gives customers an alternative to large retail chains while supporting Pontypool Market and the local independent business community.

businesses.shortDescription: Specialist BBQ and log burner retailer in Cwmbran offering premium outdoor cooking equipment, fuels and expert advice.
businesses.name: South Wales Barbeques

imageAlt.cardImage: South Wales Barbeques logo or business image.
imageAlt.heroImage: South Wales Barbeques featured business image.

gallery.assets/images/businesses/south-wales-bar: Barbecue products and outdoor cooking supplies from South Wales Barbeques.

businesses.description:
At South Wales Barbeques, we're passionate about helping people make the most of outdoor cooking. Whether you're a seasoned BBQ enthusiast or buying your very first grill, our knowledgeable team is committed to providing expert advice, quality products and outstanding customer service every step of the way.

Based in Cwmbran, we are one of South Wales' leading specialist barbecue retailers, offering an extensive range of premium gas, charcoal, pellet and electric barbecues from trusted brands, alongside a huge selection of accessories, fuels, cookware and outdoor cooking essentials.

We believe that a barbecue is more than just a way to cook – it's about bringing family and friends together to create memorable experiences. That's why we carefully select products that combine exceptional performance, durability and value, ensuring our customers enjoy years of outdoor cooking.

Our experienced team takes pride in offering honest, practical advice to help you choose the right barbecue for your garden, lifestyle and budget. From expert product recommendations to after-sales support, we're dedicated to making every customer's experience enjoyable and stress-free.

In addition to supplying market-leading barbecue brands, we also host BBQ cooking demonstrations and workshops, giving customers the opportunity to develop new skills, learn professional techniques and get the very best from their equipment.

Whether you're looking for a compact grill for family meals, a premium outdoor kitchen or the latest barbecue accessories, South Wales Barbeques is your trusted local destination for everything outdoor cooking.

**Expert Advice. Premium Brands. Exceptional Outdoor Cooking.**

Visit our showroom in Cwmbran or shop online with confidence.
